name: Butter Pecan Ice Cream Dessert
recipeInstructions:
1. Crush the Lorna Doone cookies and mix with the softened butter. Press into a 9x13-inch pan.
2. Bake at 325°F for 12-15 minutes until lightly browned.
3. In a large bowl, soften the ice cream on medium speed.
4. Add the dry vanilla pudding and blend slightly.
5. Incorporate cold milk, beating for 2-3 minutes.
6. Pour into the cooled crust layer.
7. Frost with Cool Whip.
8. Sprinkle crushed Heath Bars on top.
9. Refrigerate; do not freeze.
